title: Blogternator Review: Incorruptible by Eric Ries
summary: Venkataraman Ganesan, a voracious reader with 800+ book reviews, calls Incorruptible a hard-hitting and iconoclastic handbook. The review highlights Financial Gravity, Spiritual Holding Companies, and the Costco hot dog example.
blockquote: Incorruptible is a hard hitting, genuine and iconoclastic handbook hoping to usher in a tectonic shift in organisational culture, management, and operations.
